revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23359502324|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Luhansk_People%27s_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Luhansk_People%27s_Republic for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}}
| alias = Luhansk People's Republic
| flag alias       = Flag of Lugansk People's Republic.svg
| flag alias-third = Flag of Lugansk People's Republic.svg
| flag alias-second= Flag of the Lugansk People's Republic (Late 2014).svg
| flag alias-first = Flag of rastyazhka-Luganskoj.svg
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| variant = {{{variant|}}}
| altlink = {{{altlink|}}}
<noinclude>
| var1 = first
| var2 = second
| var3 = third
| redir1 = Luhansk Republic
</noinclude>
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
